positive_prompt:
pixel art, 32x32 style, top-down view, stone-age primitive, 16-color earthy palette, crisp pixels, no outline blur
wooden frame with horizontal cross-beams, strips of hide or fish hanging, primitive lashing with fiber cord, open-air

notes: Food preservation. Hide strips, not cloth.
